docTitle: Baibuli mu Maapu · Baibuli mu Kuzingulula Kumu
metaDesc: Goberera ennyiriri y'ebiro by'Endagaano Enkadde, obulamu bwa Yesu, n'olugendo lwa Pawulo ku maapu entuufu — Baibuli yabaawo mu bifo eby'amazima.

s.title: Baibuli mu Maapu
s.verse: “Kubanga tetwagoberera ngero ezaagunjibwa n'amagezi bwe twabategeeza obuyinza n'okujja kwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, naye twalaba n'amaaso gaffe obukulu bwe.” (2 Peetero 1:16)
s.purpose: Baibuli si nfumo. Kye kiwandiiko ky'abantu abaatambulira mu bifo, ennaku, n'amannya eby'amazima. Goberera amakubo ago ku maapu, mu ntegeka y'ebiro — koona ku kifo, oba nyiga ▶ otambule mu kyo emitendera n'emitendera.
s.ot_kick: ① Endagaano Enkadde — okuyita mu biro
s.ot_h: Okuva ku kutonda okutuuka ku kudda e Yerusaalemi
s.ot_lead: Si lugendo lumu naye kukulukuta kw'ebyafaayo eby'okununula okuva ku kutonda: okutonda n'okugwa → amataba ne Babulooni → okuyitibwa (Ibulayimu) → ensi eyasuubizibwa → Okuva mu Misiri → eddungu → okuwangula → obwakabaka → okwawukana → obusibe → okudda.
s.je_kick: ② Endagaano Empya — obulamu bwa Yesu
s.je_h: Okuva e Besirekemu okutuuka e Yerusaalemi
s.je_lead: Goberera obulamu bwa Yesu nga Enjiri bwe ziboogerako, mu ntegeka — okuva ku kuzaalibwa kwe e Besirekemu ng'oyita mu kubatizibwa kwe n'obuweereza obwa Ggaliraaya, ng'osomoka Samaliya, okutuuka ku musaalaba, okuzuukira n'okulinnya mu ggulu e Yerusaalemi.
s.pa_kick: ③ Endagaano Empya — olugendo lwa Pawulo
s.pa_h: Okuva e Antiyokiya okutuuka ku nkomerero z'ensi — Ruumi
s.pa_lead: Okuva ku Pentekooti mu Yerusaalemi, enjiri bwe yasaasaana ebweru wa Buyudaaya — ng'eyita mu Asiya Entono ne Bulaaya okutuuka ku mutima gw'obwakabaka. Londa olumu ku ngendo ettaano (olw'1·olw'2·olw'3 + olugendo olw'okugenda e Ruumi + oluvannyuma lw'okuteebwa) era ogoberere ebintu eby'Ebikolwa wamu n'ebbaluwa ezaawandiikibwa mu kkubo.
s.foot: Ensonda · Ebifo bigoberera ebyawandiikibwa mu Baibuli ne jiyogulafiya eya bulijjo eya Baibuli (n'amannya ag'omu biro bino we gayamba). Olubalama lw'ennyanja, emigga, n'ennyanja byakubibwa okuva mu data ya jiyogulafiya enzigule (Natural Earth), nga zoorobyezeddwa.

eden.name: Edeni (Okutonda · Okugwa)
eden.note: Mu nsi eyakolebwa ng'ennungi nnyo, ekibi kiyingira ne kimenya enkolagana wakati wa Katonda n'abantu.
events: Okutonda mu nnaku omukaaga — “kyali kirungi nnyo”
Omuntu eyakolebwa mu kifaananyi kya Katonda
Endagaano ey'enjiri esooka — “ezzadde ly'omukazi liribetenta omutwe gw'omusota”

noah.name: Alalaati (Amataba)
noah.today: Olusozi Alalaati, ebuvanjuba bwa Buttuluki leero
noah.note: Katonda asalira omusango ensi ejjudde ekibi, naye n'awonya obulamu ng'ayita mu maka gamu.
events: Endagaano ey'omukolomula — “sirikomyawo nate mataba kuzikiriza nsi”

babel.name: Omunaala gwa Babeeri
babel.note: Eri amalala agatuuka ku ggulu, Katonda asaasaanya olulimi lwabwe n'amawanga ku nsi.
events: Amawanga gasaasaana ku nsi (Sinaali — oluvannyuma Babulooni)

ur.name: Uli
ur.note: Olugero lwa Baibuli olw'okununula lutandika n'okuyitibwa kw'omuntu omu.
events: Katonda ayita Ibulaamu okuva e Uli ekya Abakaludaaya
“Ndikufuula eggwanga eddene… ebika byonna mwe biriweerwa omukisa”

haran.name: Kalani
haran.note: Mu kkubo, ng'addamu okuyitibwa okwolekera ensi eyasuubizibwa.
events: Ennyumba ya Teera ebeera e Kalani
Ibulaamu agenda e Kanani ng'alina emyaka 75

shechem.name: Sekemu · Kanani
shechem.note: Mu nsi eyasuubizibwa amaka gateekebwawo n'endagaano eyita mu mirembe.
events: Okuyingira Kanani, ekyoto ekisooka — “ezzadde lyo ndiriwa ensi eno”
Abaana kkumi na babiri aba Yakobo — omulandira gw'ebika ekkumi n'ebibiri

egypt.name: Misiri (Goseni)
egypt.note: Amaka gafuuka eggwanga eddene — oluvannyuma eggwanga ery'abaddu.
events: Yusufu, eyatundibwa, atuuka ku buyinza mu Misiri
Ennyumba ya Yakobo yonna eserengeta okudduka enjala
Eggwanga lya Isiraeri eryeyongera obungi lifuulibwa abaddu

sinai.name: Olusozi Sinaayi
sinai.note: Okununula okusinga obukulu mu Ndagaano Enkadde — abaddu bafuuka eggwanga lya Katonda.
events: Amateeka Ekkumi, Amateeka, Eweema ne ssaddaaka

kadesh.name: Kadesi (eddungu)
kadesh.note: Obutakkiriza buggya omulembe gumu ensi — naye Katonda asigala nabo.
events: Abakessi ekkumi na babiri — naye abantu bagaana okwesiga
Emyaka 38 mu ddungu — emaanu, ekire n'omuliro
Ku lusenyi lwa Mowaabu, okubuulira kwa Musa okw'enkomerero (Ekyamateeka)

jericho.name: Yeriko
jericho.note: Ku nkomerero bayingira ne batwala ensi eyasuubizibwa.

shiloh.name: Siiro (Abalamuzi)
shiloh.note: Awatali kabaka, buli muntu akola nga bw'ayagala — kabaka ow'amazima yeetaagisa.
events: Luusi — obwesigwa mu nnaku ez'ekizikiza, mu lulyo lwa Dawudi

jerusalem.name: Yerusaalemi · Obwakabaka Obwagatta
jerusalem.note: Omulembe gwa zaabu ogwa Isiraeri — n'endagaano ya kabaka ow'olubeerera.
events: Sawulo kabaka eyasooka, oluvannyuma Dawudi ne Goliyaasi
Endagaano ne Dawudi — “entebe yo erinywezebwa ennaku zonna” (2 Sam 7)

samaria.name: Samaliya · Obwakabaka Obwawukana
samaria.note: Obwakabaka bwawukanamu ne bugwa nga bannabbi bakaaba.
events: Oluvannyuma lwa Sulemaani, okwawukanamu mu Yuda ne Isiraeri
Eriya, Isaaya, Yeremiya bakaaba nti ‘mudde’ — era balagula Masiya

nineveh.name: Nineeve (Bwasuli)
nineveh.note: Nga banyooma buli kulabula, obwakabaka obwa bukiika kkono bugwa busooka.
events: Obwakabaka obwa bukiika kkono bugwa eri Bwasuli (722 BC)

babylon.name: Babulooni
babylon.note: Ekiro ekisinga ekizikiza — naye endagaano ey'okuzza obuggya esigala.
events: Danyeri ne Ezeekyeri — okukkiriza n'okwolesebwa mu busibe

susa.name: Susani (Buperusi)
susa.note: Ne mu mutima gw'obwakabaka obw'abakaafiiri, Katonda akuuma abantu be.
events: Nekkemiya asaba mu maaso ga kabaka n'atumibwa

return.name: Okudda e Yerusaalemi
return.note: Badda ne baddaabiriza — naye tewali kabaka azze. Balindirira Masiya.
events: Amabunga asatu ag'okudda olw'ekiragiro kya Kuulo (Zerubbaberi 538 · Ezera 458 · Nekkemiya 444)
Yeekaalu eddaabirizibwa ne bbugwe wa Yerusaalemi azzibwawo
Malaki — Endagaano Enkadde ekomekkerezebwa: “ntuma omubaka wange”

bethlehem.name: Besirekemu
bethlehem.note: Masiya eyasuubizibwa ajja mu kibuga kya Dawudi — Kigambo eyafuuka omubiri.
events: Yazaalibwa e Besirekemu, ekibuga kya Dawudi

nazareth.name: Nazaaleesi
nazareth.note: Katonda akulira ng'omuntu mu kibuga ekya bulijjo.
events: Mu myaka kkumi n'ebiri, abuuza n'addamu mu yeekaalu

jordan.name: Omugga Yoludaani
jordan.note: Obuweereza bwe obw'olukale butandika — eggulu limukakasa nga Omwana.
events: Omwoyo akka ng'ejjuba — “Ono ye Mwana wange omwagalwa”
Awangula okukemebwa kwa Sitaani okusatu mu ddungu

cana.name: Kaana
cana.note: Mu kabonero ke akasooka alaga ekitiibwa kye.
events: Amazzi gafuulibwa wayini — akabonero ke akasooka

sychar.name: Sukali (Samaliya)
sychar.note: Ekkubo ery'obuweereza obw'oluberyeberye — okuyita mu Yerusaalemi okutuuka ku Samaliya enyoomeddwa.
events: Mu kiro, Nikodemo — “oteekwa okuzaalibwa omulundi ogwokubiri”

capernaum.name: Kaperunawumu
capernaum.note: Ekikolerwamu eky'obuweereza obwa Ggaliraaya — okuyita, okuyigiriza, n'okuwakanya byonna bisisinkanira wano.
events: Ayita abavubi era ne yeesimba wano
Okubuulira ku lusozi — “Balina omukisa abaavu mu mwoyo”

caesarea_p.name: Kayisaliya Firipi
caesarea_p.note: Abayigirizwa bategeera nti ye Kristo, n'ekkubo ery'omusaalaba liggulawo.
events: Okwatula kwa Peetero — “Ggwe Kristo, Omwana wa Katonda omulamu”
Alagula okusooka okufa kwe n'okuzuukira kwe
Yakyusibwa endabika mu kitiibwa ku lusozi

jericho.name: Yeriko
jericho.note: Ku kkubo erambuka okugenda e Yerusaalemi, anoonya ababuze.

bethany.name: Besaniya
bethany.note: Alaga obuyinza ku kufa nga wessabwaako wiiki ye ey'enkomerero.
events: Azuukiza Laazaalo okuva mu ntaana — “Nze kuzuukira n'obulamu”

jerusalem.name: Yerusaalemi
jerusalem.note: Entikko Baibuli yonna gye yali eraga — omusaalaba, okuzuukira, okulinnya mu ggulu.
events: Okuyingira mu kitiibwa; awanula emmeeza za yeekaalu nate
Ku Kyekiro eky'Enkomerero anaaza abayigirizwa ebigere
Yazuukira ku lunaku olw'okusatu, oluvannyuma n'alinnya mu ggulu

antioch.name: Antiyokiya
antioch.note: Ekkanisa etuma, obuweereza eri Abamawanga we butandikira era we budda.
events: Mu kusaba Omwoyo ayawula Balunabba ne Sawulo

seleucia.name: Sereukiya
seleucia.note: Omwalo gwa Antiyokiya — basaabala okugenda e Kupulo.

salamis.name: Salamisi (Kupulo)
salamis.note: Ekifo ekisooka ku Kupulo — okubuulira mu makkuŋŋaaniro.

paphos.name: Pafo
paphos.note: Amaanyi galagibwa eri abo abaziyiza enjiri.

perga.name: Peruge
perga.note: Omwalo mu Panfuliya — wano Yokaana Makko akyukira emabega.

pantioch.name: Antiyokiya ow'omu Pisidiya
events: Okubuulira okuwanvu okw'ebyafaayo eby'obulokozi mu kkuŋŋaaniro
Abamawanga bangi basanyuka ne bakkiriza ekigambo

iconium.name: Ikoniya
iconium.note: Bangi bakkiriza, naye okuyigganyizibwa kubawaliriza okweyongerayo.

lystra.name: Lusitera
lystra.note: Bamutenda nga katonda, oluvannyuma ne bamukuba amayinja.
events: Awonya omusajja eyali mulema okuva mu lubuto
Ekibiina kigezaako okubawaayo ssaddaaka nga bakatonda
Yakubibwa amayinja n'alekebwa ng'afudde, naye n'agolokoka

derbe.name: Derube
derbe.note: Abayigirizwa bangi bakolebwa; baddayo mu makubo gaabwe okunyweza amakanisa.

troas.name: Tirowa
troas.note: Ekifo eky'enkyukakyuka enjiri we yasooka okwolekera Bulaaya.

philippi.name: Firipi
philippi.note: Ekkanisa esooka eya Bulaaya — enjiri ewangula ne mu kkomera.
events: Ludiya, omuguzi w'engoye eza ffulungu, akkiriza
Ennyimba mu ttumbi, musisi, ennyumba y'omukuumi ekkomera elokolebwa

thess.name: Sessaloniika
thess.note: Ekigambo kinyeenya ekibuga era okuwakanya kweyongera.
events: Akubaganya ebirowoozo mu kkuŋŋaaniro Bassabbiiti basatu

athens.name: Asene
events: Ku Aleyopaago abuulira ku Mutonzi n'okuzuukira

corinth.name: Kkolinso
corinth.note: Abeerawo omwaka n'ekitundu, ng'asimba ekkanisa mu kibuga eky'obwonoonefu.
events: Akola eweema ne Akula ne Pulisikira

ephesus.name: Efeso
ephesus.note: Omutima gw'olugendo olw'okusatu — ekigambo kisaasaana okuyita mu Asiya.
events: Okuyigiriza buli lunaku okumala emyaka ebiri mu kisenge kya Tulano
Demeteriyo omuweesi wa ffeeza atandika akeegugungo

miletus.name: Mireeto
miletus.note: Okusiibula okw'amaziga eri abakadde b'e Efeso.
events: “Mulabirire ekkanisa gye yagula n'omusaayi gwe ye”
Abakadde bakaaba, nga bamanyi nti tebaliddamu kumulaba

caesarea.name: Kayisaliya
caesarea.note: Okumala emyaka ebiri awoza enjiri mu maaso g'abafuzi ne kabaka.
events: Emisango mu maaso g'abafuzi Felikisi ne Fesuto
Okwerwanirira kwe mu maaso wa Kabaka Agulipa

jerusalem.name: Yerusaalemi
jerusalem.note: Akwatibwa mu yeekaalu, ekkubo lye ng'omusibe litandika.
events: Nga munnansi Omuruumi, atumibwa ng'akuumiddwa okugenda e Kayisaliya

myra.name: Mura
myra.note: Bakyusiza mu kyombo eky'e Alegezandiriya ekigenda e Ruumi.

fairhaven.name: Emyalo Emirungi (Kuleete)
fairhaven.note: Okulabula kwa Pawulo okuyimiriza okusaabala tekuwulirwa.

crete.name: Kuleete
crete.note: Oluvannyuma lw'okuteebwa, ekizinga gye yaleka Tito okutereeza amakanisa.
events: Aleka Tito okulonda abakadde mu buli kibuga
Akoowoola abakulembeze abataliiko kya kunenyezebwa, abeesigwa

malta.name: Merita
malta.note: Ng'ayita mu muyaga n'okwabika kw'ekyombo, endagaano ya Katonda enyweera.
events: ‘Omuyaga ogw'obukiika kkono ebuvanjuba’ gwabika ekyombo, naye bonna 276 bawona

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Bagwa mu Buyitale era ne basisinkanibwa abooluganda.

rome.name: Ruumi
rome.note: Enjiri ekomawo ku mutima gw'obwakabaka — si nkomerero naye ntandikwa.
events: Emyaka ebiri ng'asibiddwa mu nnyumba, ng'alangirira obwakabaka n'obuvumu
Oluvannyuma yasibibwa nate, awandiika 2 Timoseewo n'attibwa — “nnwanye okulwana okulungi, nnamazze olugendo”
